release_notes: 1. Fixed Screen flickering in portrait mode
2.Word by word translations the dots are removed now for clutter free reading, available when phone switched to landscape mode (turn on Autoroate)
3.Quran time in home screen is now clickable and shows weekly / monthly stats
4.Juz mode supports search by entering values from 1 to 30
5.Qur'anic dua's available in burger menu, fixed on click to navigate to exact verse in Recite mode
6.Page mode click the brown page icon 📜 in recite tab, Autoscroll available in Page mode
7.Stats tab overall memorization circles click enabled to see description
💙 Share the iHafidh App to your family & friends, earn Hasanath & Sadaqah Jaariyah when other benefit by reading & memorizing from iHafidh, JazakAllahu Khairan 🤲

announcement.title: Help More Muslims Find iHafidh
announcement.content: Alhamdulillah — if this app has helped you, leaving a quick App Store review is Sadaqah Jariyah. Every Muslim who discovers iHafidh through your review earns you ongoing reward. 🤲
